---
title: "Exhibition Timeline"
subtitle: "Sprengel Museum Hannover — chronological view of exhibitions"
description: "Interactive timeline of Sprengel Museum exhibitions sourced from Wikidata."
date: today
execute:
  echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: load-json
#| output: false
import json
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import display, Javascript

XML_PATH = Path("ausstellungen/exhibitions.xml")
tree = ET.parse(XML_PATH)
root = tree.getroot()

def text(el, tag):
    child = el.find(tag)
    return child.text.strip() if child is not None and child.text else ""

items = []
for i, ex in enumerate(root.findall("exhibition"), start=1):
    start = text(ex, "start_date")
    end   = text(ex, "end_date")
    title = text(ex, "title") or text(ex, "slug")
    if not start:
        continue
    item = {
        "id":      i,
        "content": title,
        "start":   start,
        "title":   (
            f"<b>{title}</b><br>"
            f"{start} – {end or '?'}<br>"
            f"{text(ex, 'curator') or ''}"
        ),
        "group":   1,
    }
    if end:
        item["end"] = end
        item["type"] = "range"
    else:
        item["type"] = "point"
    items.append(item)

# Emit JSON for use in OJS cell below
items_json = json.dumps(items, ensure_ascii=False)
```

```{python}
#| label: pass-to-ojs
#| output: false
from IPython.display import display

# Write the items JSON to a side-car file read by OJS
import pathlib
pathlib.Path("ausstellungen/timeline-items.json").write_text(
    items_json, encoding="utf-8"
)
print(f"Wrote {len(items)} timeline items.")
```

```{=html}
<link  href="https://unpkg.com/vis-timeline@7.7.3/dist/vis-timeline-graph2d.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/vis-timeline@7.7.3/dist/vis-timeline-graph2d.min.js"></script>

<div id="timeline-container" style="height: 520px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;"></div>

<script type="module">
  // Load timeline items written by Python above
  const resp  = await fetch("ausstellungen/timeline-items.json");
  const items = await resp.json();

  const container = document.getElementById("timeline-container");
  const dataset   = new vis.DataSet(items);
  const options   = {
    orientation: { axis: "top" },
    stack: true,
    showMajorLabels: true,
    showMinorLabels: true,
    zoomMin: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30,      // 1 month minimum zoom
    zoomMax: 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365 * 10, // 10 years maximum zoom
    tooltip: { followMouse: true, overflowMethod: "cap" },
    locale: "en",
  };
  new vis.Timeline(container, dataset, options);
</script>
```

---

## Exhibition List (sorted by date)

```{python}
#| label: sorted-table
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML

rows = []
for ex in root.findall("exhibition"):
    start = text(ex, "start_date")
    if not start:
        continue
    qid = text(ex, "qid")
    rows.append({
        "Title":    text(ex, "title") or text(ex, "slug"),
        "Start":    start,
        "End":      text(ex, "end_date") or "–",
        "Location": text(ex, "location"),
        "Curator":  text(ex, "curator"),
        "Wikidata": (
            f'<a href="https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{qid}" target="_blank">{qid}</a>'
            if qid else ""
        ),
    })

df = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("Start").reset_index(drop=True)
df.index = range(1, len(df) + 1)
HTML(df.to_html(escape=False, classes="table table-sm table-striped table-hover", border=0))
```
